---
description: "Ownership node for repository documentation."
applyTo: "docs/**, README.md"
---

Keep docs accurate, skimmable, and aligned with the real system.

- Do not claim behavior that is not implemented or clearly marked as planned.
- Prefer source-of-truth references over duplicated prose.

## Follow-Through Triggers

- If docs describe changed behavior, verify that code, tests, and reference docs still support the claim.
